summary: Status and KYC Badge Visual Enhancement Testing Complete - All new badge components render correctly with proper colored styling matching bank-grade UI standards. No console errors found.

status_badge_active.details: ACTIVE status shows green badge (bg-green-100, text-green-800) with checkmark icon

status_badge_pending.details: PENDING status shows amber badge (bg-amber-100, text-amber-800) with clock icon

kyc_badge_approved.details: APPROVED KYC shows green badge (bg-green-100, text-green-800) with checkmark icon

kyc_badge_pending.details: PENDING/SUBMITTED KYC shows blue badge (bg-blue-100, text-blue-800) with clock icon

kyc_badge_not_submitted.details: 'Not submitted' KYC shows slate gray badge (bg-slate-100, text-slate-600) with info icon

email_verified_badge.details: Existing Email Verified badge still displays correctly - green for verified, yellow for not verified

user_details_page_loads.details: User Details page loads correctly with all badge components rendering properly

admin_action_buttons.details: All action buttons (Disable/Enable, Delete, Verify Email, Clear Notifications) visible and present

admin_users_navigation.details: Users navigation and search functionality working correctly

no_console_errors.details: No JavaScript console errors detected during testing

admin_sections.details: All admin sections load correctly: Overview, KYC Queue, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers Queue, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings

critical_code_review_comments: StatusBadge and KycBadge components properly follow existing Email Verified badge design pattern
Both components include data-testid attributes for automated testing: status-badge and kyc-badge
Badge styling uses consistent Tailwind classes: inline-flex, items-center, px-2, py-0.5, rounded, text-xs, font-medium
Icons are properly sized (w-3 h-3) with mr-1 spacing
Status normalization handles various case formats via toUpperCase().trim()

success_rate.backend: N/A (visual-only change, no backend testing required)

context_for_next_testing_agent: StatusBadge and KycBadge components added to App.js. StatusBadge displays user account status (ACTIVE=green, PENDING=amber, DISABLED=red). KycBadge displays KYC status (APPROVED=green, PENDING=blue, REJECTED=red, Not submitted=slate). Both match existing Email Verified badge styling. Test users: Hannan Mohammad Abdul (ACTIVE, APPROVED), Kostakis Klavans (PENDING, PENDING KYC), Test Withphone (PENDING, Not submitted).
